framework.name: NIST Measure Function - Use-Case Dependent Metrics
framework.description: NIST AI RMF explicitly states 'What should be measured depends on the purpose, audience, and needs of the evaluations' — meaning metrics are NOT prescribed universally. The framework delegates measurement design to the deployer, creating a structural gap where no minimum baseline window is mandated.
framework.raw_quote: What should be measured depends on the purpose, audience, and needs of the evaluations.

source.title: Measure - AIRC - NIST AI Resource Center
